name: Pacific Asia China Energy
description: Pacific Asia China Energy Inc. (formerly trading as PCE on the TSX Venture Exchange) was a Canadian-based energy company focused on the exploration and development of coalbed methane (CBM) resources in China. The company held significant concessions in China's Guizhou province, aiming to utilize advanced drilling technologies to degasify coal mines and produce clean energy. By partnering with local entities, the firm sought to capitalize on China's growing demand for natural gas while addressing critical safety and environmental challenges associated with coal mining operations through its specialized drilling and exploration services.
